model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.

summary: The prettier code formatter check failed because packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js does not conform to Prettier formatting standards.
root_cause: File packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted according to Prettier standards.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
    Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:


packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js
evidence.reason: The prettier check script explicitly identified this file as needing formatting and instructs running yarn prettier-all

evidence.reason: The yarn prettier-check command exited with a non-zero status, indicating the formatting check failed
The job executed the prettier validation script which checks code formatting compliance
